title: UI Component Generator|OBJECTIVE: Generate the HTML and CSS code for a reusab...
prompt: ROLE: UI Component Generator|OBJECTIVE: Generate the HTML and CSS code for a reusable **{component_name}** component based on the design specifications.|REQUIREMENTS: The component must be responsive and work on screen sizes from {min_width}px to {max_width}px.|Follow the BEM (Block, Element, Modifier) naming convention for CSS classes.|The design should adhere to the style guide defined by the brand color {brand_color_hex}.|STYLE: Pixel-perfect, clean code, and production-ready.|OUTPUT FORMAT: An HTML file with embedded CSS.
